steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The passage shows GRB 230307A lasted 200 seconds, then immediately notes that neutron merger bursts typically last fewer than 2 seconds. This stark discrepancy signals that the blank should convey something unexpected or unusual about this burst.

steps.title: Find the word expressing 'unexpected'
steps.content: The blank requires a word meaning “something unexpected or strange.” “An oddity” expresses this exactly—it captures how atypical a 200-second burst is for a neutron merger event. The other three fail to convey this sense of scientific unusualness: “incident” is neutral, “reprieve” suggests relief, and “coincidence” implies randomness. That matches choice D — D is correct.
